exercise_requirement: Build a small parameter-aware Transformer encoder and compare it fairly with dense, CNN, and recurrent models.
research_question: Can self-attention improve validation performance or error structure on short automotive descriptions?
hypothesis: A compact Transformer may improve phrase interactions but will not necessarily outperform simpler models on limited data.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
